ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the product in years */,
  "brand" INTEGER /* Brand name of the product */,
  "rate_impute" INTEGER /* Imputed rating value */,
  "price_impute" INTEGER /* Imputed price value */,
  "abv_impute" INTEGER /* Imputed ABV value */,
  "age_impute" INTEGER /* Imputed age value */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle */,
  "bottle_type" TEXT /* Type of the bottle */,
  "distillery" TEXT /* Distillery where the product is produced */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the product */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently available for sale */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company that owns the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., User, Expert) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed review text */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, sales) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose price is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the specified date */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the compliance record */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation to comply with */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance status was last checked */,
  "responsible_entity" TEXT /* Entity responsible for ensuring compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_compliance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the version is associated with */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the store is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
